faq.sectionDescription: Explore our Frequently Asked Questions for LG Built-in Appliances, providing quick insights and solutions to ensure seamless operation and satisfaction.

items.question: What if I want to change kitchen with LG built-in products?
items.answer: If it is a built-in product (Gas Oven, Cooking hob), it must be installed according to the kitchen furniture. so you should contact a kitchen furniture company or interior design company to check the type and size of the kitchen furniture.

items.question: Can’t I just use the built-in dishwasher without combining to furniture?
items.answer:
There is no problem at all in using the product.However, since built-in products are manufactured to be combined with furniture, if the furniture is not combined, the body itself does not come out as a finished product, making it visually unsightly. 
Please keep this in mind.

items.question: Is it impossible to replace it once installed?
items.answer: Replacement is possible after installation. You can reinstall the product as long as the built-in installation space is secured.
